rationale: Builds directly on the current soft quant-aware projection-ramp winner while pivoting back to the exact final quantizer rather than another schedule replay. Large 2D tensors still use the adaptive row-offset path, but now the quantizer explicitly compares mean-centered and midpoint-centered row offsets and keeps whichever gives lower reconstruction error before the existing late soft roundtrip ramp and exact final eval. That targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb directly, adds no new artifact metadata beyond the existing per-row offset vector, keeps the hot loop unchanged, and removes the now-unneeded quant-aware LR helper to stay lean under the line cap.
title: Midpoint-Choice Row-Offset Int8
